[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 6/30 (Mon), Scrimmage reward will be doubled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 6/30 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 7/7 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
